His primary role on the field is pitching, not playing a defensive position at first base. Next, "was safe at first" is a phrase commonly used in baseball to describe a batter who reaches first base without the defense recording an out. This can happen via a hit, a walk, an error, or a hit-by-pitch. The phrase typically applies to batters, not pitchers.
